since_last: 83% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.85%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 83% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.18% · BTC +1.02% · Gold -1.08% · Nasdaq100 +2.25%. 83% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.85%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.85%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +1.03%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: HON is the standout at -50.95%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +21.40%, KLAC +11.71%, AMAT +11.67%, BIDU +9.28%, PANW +8.99%. Laggards: HON -50.95%, SMCI -6.75%, DLR -3.42%, SYNA -2.20%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +6.60% at $163.34
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +6.60% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
